content.problemStatement:
You are given an integer sequence A=(A1,A2,‚Ä¶,AN)A=(A_1, A_2,\dots, A_N)A=(A1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč) of length NNN and an integer MMM such that 0‚Č§M<‚ąĎi=1NAi0 \leq M \lt \sum\limits_{i=1}^N A_i0‚Č§M<i=1‚ąĎN‚ÄčAi‚Äč.

An integer sequence B=(B1,B2,‚Ä¶,BN)B=(B_1, B_2,\dots, B_N)B=(B1‚Äč,B2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,BN‚Äč) of length NNN is called good if:


0‚Č§Bi‚Č§Ai0 \le B_i \le A_i0‚Č§Bi‚Äč‚Č§Ai‚Äč for each 1‚Č§i‚Č§N1\le i \le N1‚Č§i‚Č§N
B1+B2+‚čĮ+BN=MB_1+ B_2+\dots+B_N=MB1‚Äč+B2‚Äč+‚čĮ+BN‚Äč=M
Find the **maximum** value of gcd‚Ā°(A1‚ąíB1,A2‚ąíB2,‚Ä¶,AN‚ąíBN)\gcd(A_1-B_1,A_2-B_2,\dots,A_N-B_N)gcd(A1‚Äč‚ąíB1‚Äč,A2‚Äč‚ąíB2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč‚ąíBN‚Äč) over all good sequences BBB. Here, gcd‚Ā°\gcdgcd denotes  the greatest common divisor.

**Note:** gcd‚Ā°(a,b,c)=gcd‚Ā°(a,gcd‚Ā°(b,c))\gcd(a,b,c) = \gcd(a,\gcd(b,c))gcd(a,b,c)=gcd(a,gcd(b,c)) and gcd‚Ā°(a,0)=gcd‚Ā°(0,a)=a\gcd(a,0)=\gcd(0,a)=agcd(a,0)=gcd(0,a)=a.


Input Format

The first line of input contains a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers N,MN, MN,M.
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč.


Output Format
For each test case, print a single line containing one integer ‚ÄĒ the **maximum** value of gcd‚Ā°(A1‚ąíB1,A2‚ąíB2,‚Ä¶,AN‚ąíBN)\gcd(A_1-B_1,A_2-B_2,\dots,A_N-B_N)gcd(A1‚Äč‚ąíB1‚Äč,A2‚Äč‚ąíB2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč‚ąíBN‚Äč) over all good sequences BBB.
